feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Hide dynamically measures
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a project in SAP Analytics Cloud that includes both budget and actual versions, along with a measure called "expenses." My goal is to create a button that, when clicked, triggers a script to hide any measures where the values are null. How can I achieve this functionality?

Thanks in advance,

Gonçalo

entry.title: Hello community,I need to add or remove dimension from a dropdown
entry.content: I need to create a dropdown where i can able to add dimensions from a dropdown also i need to remove the selected dimensions from the dropdown it is like having an checkbox inside a dropdown it will reflect in the chart or the table

entry.title: Cant Delete Member ID from Account Dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
For Some reason i am unable to delete some ID's that i uploaded through data management into the account dimension and its driving me insane.

Please look at the images.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Filter Data Action based on Dimension Property via Scripting
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

While researching this topic, I came across several discussions where people were asking if it's possible to filter a Data Action based on Dimension Properties. The common answer was "No."

However, I have an idea:

  1. I can create a script that initializes a dropdown menu populated with the Dimension Properties.
  2. The user selects an option from the dropdown.
  3. Based on the user's selection, the script assigns the corresponding Dimension members to a variable.

This variable would then be used to populate the parameter in the Data Action, triggering its execution.

Would this approach work? If so, could you provide some example scripts to help implement this?

 

Kind regards,

ismail

@N1kh1l special thanks to you in advance.

entry.title: Set Default Home Page in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Gurus - I know that we have an option to set a default page when we login to SAC. In our current tenant, when we login to SAC using the below URL, it automatically navigates all the users to a admin homepage (created based out of an Analytical Application).

Link that is being redirected to

I want to change this Analytical Application and replace it with a story. Tried to look into the admin settings but could not find where it is configured. Can you guide me how it can be achieved?

Thanks,

PS

entry.title: SAC OData - How to connect API with Authentication Bearer
entry.content:
Hi everyone, can someone help me find a solution!

We have some devices called "TERM", used mainly to collect data. These data are saved in a MDM platform (Mobile Device Management). Our objective is to extract these data from MDM into SAP Analytics Cloud for reporting purpose.

The manufacturer of TERM give access to these data only through API (Application Programming Language). He gave us : (1) URL that points to the MDM and (2) Authentication bearer which is a token used normally in the coding part.

While trying to connect this to SAC, we figure out that SAC doesn't support natively this kind of API (OData connection). See "OData connection - Authentication type" list image below. None of OData connection allow us to enter the Authentication Bearer as parameter..

Since the objective is to send data in SAC, preferably in form of Data Model, can someone help me find out how this can be done in SAC please ?

By the way, API Url + Anthentication Bearer have been tested and work perfectly in Postman.

Thank you in advance for your help !

Jean-Yves.

entry.title: SAC Story - align tables to move dynamically
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have panel with filters on the top of the page which can expand/collapse. Below it I have table which I want to move up once the filter panel is collapsed (to be aligned to the bottom side of this filter panel) so it won't have blank space between both once it is collapsed.

Is it possible somehow to do that?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Multi Action - Dynamically derive period for Data Lock step
entry.content:
Hello Gurus - I have a multi action that is being called in Calendar Event. This multi action would extract the data from S4 and loads into SAC Dimensions and Models. While loading the data into models, I am unlocking all periods and locking them back once the loads are completed. However, this is locking the forecast period which is causing issues with Planning.

Any input on passing forecast period dynamically to "Data Locking Step" in multi action? I have forecast starting and ending months in a dimension with member id WKFCSTDEF and properties StartMonth and EndMonth. Please do remember, this multi action is called from Calendar event as daily job.

Any other alternate approach is also fine with me. I want to unlock forecast period after daily loads.

Thanks,

PS

entry.title: How to use Account value to PREVIOUS function of Date in Data action
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where the user wants to input the number of months for delay in payment.

Let’s say we have 3 GLs – Number_of_Month, Payment, Delayed_payment

Number_of_Month – User inputs number of months

Delayed_payment – Previous (Number_of_Month) of Payment

When I write the DA for this like below it is working for a single company code but when I have Number_of_Month for another company code then it sums up the Number_of_Month

 

INTEGER @A

@A = RESULTLOOKUP([d/GLACCOUNT] = " Number_of_Month, [d/Date] = "000000")

IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/GLACCOUNT] = """ Number_of_Month, [d/Date] = "000000"> 0 THEN

DATA([d/GLACCOUNT] = "Delayed_payment") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = PREVIOUS (@A, "MONTH"), [d/GLACCOUNT] = "Payment")

ENDIF

I run this for 202412 period

This works as expected when we have value for only one company code.

GL Account

Company Code

Date

Amount

Payment

CC1

202212

100

Payment

CC1

202312

200

Payment

CC2

202212

111

Payment

CC2

202312

222

Number_of_Month

CC1

#

12

Number_of_Month

CC2

#

-

Delayed_payment

CC1

202412

200

Delayed_payment

CC2

202412

-

 

But when I have months for another Company code it sums up (12+12=24 month) and shows the 202212th value for both Company codes

GL Account

Company Code

Date

Amount

Payment

CC1

202212

100

Payment

CC1

202312

200

Payment

CC2

202212

111

Payment

CC2

202312

222

Number_of_Month

CC1

#

12

Number_of_Month

CC2

#

12

Delayed_payment

CC1

202412

100

Delayed_payment

CC2

202412

111

 

I have tried using FOREACH and also VARIABLEMEMBER as well but no luck.

Is there any other way to achieve this.

Thanks in advance.

Vijay

entry.title: How to find average based on entries of transactional data?
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is the scenario. I want to write a data action logic which calculates the average sales based on no of products present in the transactional data. For example, product quantity is present for three products in the transactional data. To calculate average sales, the formula is Total sales / (no. of products present in transactional data). Please refer below screenshot.

I'm unable to find unique records for products in the data action logic. Currently, there are three products and this product count is not fixed, it can four or five anytime. A data action action logic which can dynamically work in all scenarios irrespective of product quantity changing over period of time. 

Anyone who has faced such type of issue or knows the workaround in this scenario. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Issue with actual data when we have data not published
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have an issue in an input schedule in SAC.

We have a column "Actuals" which is feeded by an import job from S/4 HANA. We have also an inputable column "Forecast" where users enter their forecasted amount.

Actuals data are imported every hours.

If we have data not published (user entered a forecasted amound and not published it), actuals data are not correctly displayed (it doesn't show the latest imported data).

Have you an idea of how to fix this issue ?

Thanks

Mat

entry.title: Incremental load in SAP SAC with Mysql source
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We want to do a incremental load with a mysql source in sap sacclassic model but we could not find it, could you please guide me how to do it.

entry.title: SAC modelling - field mappings and measures
entry.content:
Hi all,  just after some guidance on the best approach to model data from different sources in SAC.
For example:
Datasource 1 contains:   User ID , Job Title , Department
Datasource 2 contains:    User ID, First name, Last Name
If I create a new model starting with data and pick say source 1 .. when I then try and add
source 2 I'm unable to as of course First name & Last name cannot be mapped to anything.

Option 2 is I create a new model with no data and manually create dimensions for both Sources above,
However SAC forces you to create a measure before allowing you to save and add data......  but as there is no measure in either data source - the mapping also fails so I can't import the data..........

Or am I missing something obvious?
Once the data is in the model in its entirety - that's when I want to create measures

 

Edit - Just for context / clarity the data i'm working with is Success Factors,  hence the need for mutiple queries in SAC as I need data from different tables in SF......

entry.title: Data locking in measures
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m working on a project where I need to lock three specific measures. My model consists of two dimensions and four measures, but I want to ensure that no one can edit three of those measures.

Is there a way to lock these specific measures? What approach should I take to solve this?

Thanks in advance,

GAnjos

entry.title: Time Calculation Data Action - From To Period
entry.content:
Hello

I need to make a data action that deletes data in a specific period using the date parameters  [p/LockedFrom] and [p/LockedTo] on the site dimension [d/Site].

Any ideas how to achieve this?

entry.title: SAC Memberset - Version Property
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I am currently creating a model in SAC, where I am building a few data actions. There is one copy data action which shall be used to populate zeros in the data range of the year of the version.

For that I have the following script:

Unfortunately, I am seeing the error code. When using a fix year in line 12, e.g. "2024", it works fine.

Do you have any idea, why I cannot use the version property, in which i am stating a year?

 

Best

entry.title: To create multiple comment in a table column - SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

I currently facing a issues where i need to create multiple comment in a table column it works, however when i comment in one of the cells it duplicated into another cells column as well. 

May I know is there any solution for this multiple comment in a table column ? 

Thank You,

Regards

Andrew

entry.title: selecting a cell in sac table
entry.content:
Is it possible to know which cell/dimension was clicked in a table during the "onSelect" event?

Method getSelections() seems to retrieve the same information (whole row) when different cells in the same row are clicked, even when the table's selection type is set to "Single Cell".

Thanks!

entry.title: How do I add a button to each row in a table in sap analytics cloud?
Is it possible to create segment buttons without default button selected?
